description: Pinned conformance Tool Registry fixture for SOA-Harness v1.0 SV-PERM-01 live-path and related permission-lattice tests. Deliberately small (8 tools) and deliberately spans every (risk_class, default_control) combination needed to exercise Core §10.3 steps 1-4 against every (session.activeMode) ∈ {ReadOnly, WorkspaceWrite, DangerFullAccess}. Implementations MAY use this fixture directly for their conformance runs or derive their own fixtures whose rows cover the same matrix.

tools.name: fs__read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the project workspace. Expected: AutoAllow under any activeMode.

tools.name: fs__list_directory
tools.description: List directory contents. Expected: AutoAllow under any activeMode.

tools.name: fs__write_file
tools.description: Write a file. Expected: CapabilityDenied under ReadOnly; Prompt under WorkspaceWrite and DangerFullAccess.

tools.name: fs__append_file
tools.description: Append to an existing file. Expected: CapabilityDenied under ReadOnly; AutoAllow under WorkspaceWrite and DangerFullAccess.

tools.name: fs__delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file. Expected: CapabilityDenied under ReadOnly and WorkspaceWrite; Prompt under DangerFullAccess.

tools.name: net__http_get
tools.description: Fetch a remote resource via HTTP GET. Read-only at the network layer but Prompt-gated by default because egress may leak data. Expected: Prompt under any activeMode.

tools.name: proc__spawn_shell
tools.description: Spawn an arbitrary shell process. Expected: CapabilityDenied under ReadOnly and WorkspaceWrite; Deny under DangerFullAccess (even at max capability, default_control forces Deny).

tools.name: mem__recall
tools.description: Recall an entry from the Memory MCP (§8). Expected: AutoAllow under any activeMode.
